tool_name: DCOIR Airtable WBS09 Native View Discovery Planner
trigger_conditions: Use before any future WBS09 Airtable native view create/configure/repair pass when the automation needs to discover current panel rows, visible controls, and selectable option surfaces before mutation.
input_contract: Requires DCOIR_REPO_ROOT and DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR Local Configuration Registry variables, Node.js, Playwright dependencies from the WBS09 UI prereq installer, a logged-in Chrome profile or CDP-attached Chrome session, and wbs09_airtable_native_views_manifest.json.
output_contract: Writes dcoir_wbs09_view_discovery_* folders under DCOIR_DOWNLOADS_DIR with launcher log, tool log, per-view discovery reports, panel readback states, control inventory, optional dropdown option probes, rollup JSON, DOM evidence, and optional screenshots.
safety_preconditions: Read-only only. Does not create, edit, or delete Airtable views, filters, sorts, fields, records, tables, or automations. Option probing opens dropdown-like controls but does not type, select, add, remove, or save. All-manifest mode requires ConfirmToken DISCOVER_ALL_MANIFEST_VIEWS.
notes: Active read-only discovery foundation for future discover -> plan -> execute -> verify automation. Validated on 2026-05-10 Governance sort-direction gap: correctly required mutation, identified change_sort_direction, and supported row-level option probing. Airtable Operator Tools Registry does not currently have airtable_ui_automation as a select choice, so operator_tool_standard is used.
